name: Detritus

sections.intro:
Detritus Disposalis the fourthislandin the gameInto the Breach. It is initially locked with the creation of a new profile and is only unlocked once the other three islands (Archive, Inc.,R.S.T. CorporationandPinnacle Robotics) are complete. Once unlocked, it can be accessed in any order.
Led byVikram Singh, Detritus specialises in the use of A.C.I.D to break down enemies and machines alike. Missions will often haveA.C.I.D. Poolswhich can be key to quickly shredding apart alphas and leaders. Other mechanics include the use ofConveyor BeltsandTeleporters, fitting the urban combat environment.
sections.Island-Specific Missions: Advanced Edition missions are only encounterable if "Advanced Missions" are on for a timeline.
sections.Reputation Objectives:
- Defend the Train: 2 ReputationA two-tile long train moves from one end of the map to another. If the train collides with anything or is damaged, it becomes adamaged trainand one reputation point is lost. Damage it again and the train is destroyed entirely, yielding no reputation.Lasts 4 turns instead of 5.Also present onArchive, Inc.andR.S.T. Corporation.
  - Defend the Disposal Unit + Destroy all mountains: 1 Reputation each, 2 totalADisposal Unitsits in a distant spot on the map which launches a cross-shaped puddle of insta-killing A.C.I.D. There are mountains arranged so that two or three uses of the unit destroys all of them.
  - Destroy the A.C.I.D Vats: 2 Reputation, 1 per VatTwoA.C.I.D Vatssit on set locations on the map, each with two points of health. Destroying a Vat converts the tile it sits on into an A.C.I.D tile.
  - Kill 4 enemies inflicted with A.C.I.D: 2 ReputationReputation is only awarded if the goal is completely fulfilled.An unupgraded A.C.I.D Tank is available. It has only 1 HP and cannot push.
  - Destroy the A.C.I.D Storm Controller (Advanced Edition): 1 ReputationAn A.C.I.D Storm Controller with 3 health is present at the start of the mission. While it is active all units are acidified. A.C.I.D is not immediately removed once the controller is destroyed.
  - Use the Detritus Contraption four times (Advanced Edition): 2 ReputationThe Detritus Contraption has two weapons, each of which can be used a maximum of two times. Both weapons affect all units on the map, regardless of whether they are enemies or allies. The first weapon shields all units, and the second weapon hits all units for 1 damage.1 Reputation is awarded if the Contraption is used at least twice.
  - Protect the VIPs: (Advanced Edition):2 Reputation, 1 for each VIPTwo Jeeps start off close to the frontline and must be protected. These Jeeps can hit the gas and move out of the way, but only twice before their fuel runs out. They can use this ability to move out of webs.
sections.Grid Power Objectives: - Protect both Power Plants: 2 Grid PowerTwo Power Plants are present instead of one.
sections.Environmental Conditions:
- Conveyor BeltsConveyor Belts move any unit on there according to the belt's direction during the environment turn.IfAdvanced Objectivesare turned on, theDestroy 2 Vek Egg Sacksobjective cannot appear with Conveyor Belts.
  - TeleportersTwo pairs of teleporters, one blue and one red, are placed at random positions on the map.Ending a unit's movement on the teleporter teleports it to the tile of the same color.
  - A.C.I.D LakesOn some missions Vek can spawn by jumping out of A.C.I.D tiles. They do not land on anyTime Podsand come out acidified.

full_text:
Detritus Disposal
Details
CEO
Vikram Singh
Environment
Industrial
Detritus tech can break down any matter into its base elements. Their factory-cities are devoted to waste removal and recycling.
Detritus Disposal
is the fourth
island
in the game
Into the Breach
. It is initially locked with the creation of a new profile and is only unlocked once the other three islands (
Archive, Inc.
,
R.S.T. Corporation
and
Pinnacle Robotics
) are complete. Once unlocked, it can be accessed in any order.
Led by
Vikram Singh
, Detritus specialises in the use of A.C.I.D to break down enemies and machines alike. Missions will often have
A.C.I.D. Pools
which can be key to quickly shredding apart alphas and leaders. Other mechanics include the use of
Conveyor Belts
and
Teleporters
, fitting the urban combat environment.
Contents
1
Map
2
Island-Specific Missions
2.1
Reputation Objectives
2.2
Grid Power Objectives
2.3
Environmental Conditions
3
Regions
Map
[
]
Island-Specific Missions
[
]
Advanced Edition missions are only encounterable if "Advanced Missions" are on for a timeline.
Reputation Objectives
[
]
Defend the Train: 2 Reputation
A two-tile long train moves from one end of the map to another. If the train collides with anything or is damaged, it becomes a
damaged train
and one reputation point is lost. Damage it again and the train is destroyed entirely, yielding no reputation.
Lasts 4 turns instead of 5.
Also present on
Archive, Inc.
and
R.S.T. Corporation
.
Defend the Disposal Unit + Destroy all mountains: 1 Reputation each, 2 total
A
Disposal Unit
sits in a distant spot on the map which launches a cross-shaped puddle of insta-killing A.C.I.D. There are mountains arranged so that two or three uses of the unit destroys all of them.
Destroy the A.C.I.D Vats: 2 Reputation, 1 per Vat
Two
A.C.I.D Vats
sit on set locations on the map, each with two points of health. Destroying a Vat converts the tile it sits on into an A.C.I.D tile.
Kill 4 enemies inflicted with A.C.I.D: 2 Reputation
Reputation is only awarded if the goal is completely fulfilled.
An unupgraded A.C.I.D Tank is available. It has only 1 HP and cannot push.
Destroy the A.C.I.D Storm Controller (
Advanced Edition)
: 1 Reputation
An A.C.I.D Storm Controller with 3 health is present at the start of the mission. While it is active all units are acidified. A.C.I.D is not immediately removed once the controller is destroyed.
Use the Detritus Contraption four times (
Advanced Edition)
: 2 Reputation
The Detritus Contraption has two weapons, each of which can be used a maximum of two times. Both weapons affect all units on the map, regardless of whether they are enemies or allies. The first weapon shields all units, and the second weapon hits all units for 1 damage.
1 Reputation is awarded if the Contraption is used at least twice.
Protect the VIPs: (
Advanced Edition):
2 Reputation, 1 for each VIP
Two Jeeps start off close to the frontline and must be protected. These Jeeps can hit the gas and move out of the way, but only twice before their fuel runs out. They can use this ability to move out of webs.
Grid Power Objectives
[
]
Protect both Power Plants: 2 Grid Power
Two Power Plants are present instead of one.
Environmental Conditions
[
]
Conveyor Belts
Conveyor Belts move any unit on there according to the belt's direction during the environment turn.
If
Advanced Objectives
are turned on, the
Destroy 2 Vek Egg Sacks
objective cannot appear with Conveyor Belts.
Teleporters
Two pairs of teleporters, one blue and one red, are placed at random positions on the map.
Ending a unit's movement on the teleporter teleports it to the tile of the same color.
A.C.I.D Lakes
On some missions Vek can spawn by jumping out of A.C.I.D tiles. They do not land on any
Time Pods
and come out acidified.
Regions
[
]
As all region names are randomized, the following list is included for completion.

Containment Zone D
Containment Zone J
